description: A metaprogramming block evaluated early during the parsing/macro stage. Used for conditional compilation, defining constants, or injecting code before semantic analysis begins.
features: Evaluated at compile-time (early phase, AST generation).
Allows writing scripts that generate code directly during compilation.
constraints: Can only reference symbols and macros known at the parsing stage.
Does not have access to variable types or semantic information (use `postmeta` for that).
